# JointClass

> Total joint replacement recovery tracking. AI-powered exercise programs, surgical prep checklists, progress reports, and movement tracking.

## What we do
JointClass is the patient-facing recovery platform for joint replacement surgery. Tracks daily goals, medication adherence, exercise completion, and movement via phone sensors. Integrates with SurgeonValue for RTM billing and PROM collection.

## Links
- Website: https://jointclass.com
- SurgeonValue: https://surgeonvalue.com
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care
